## Executive Summary

- **[hiero-json-rpc-relay](https://github.com/hiero-ledger/hiero-json-rpc-relay) Pectra work organized around a shared parser** - week two consolidated the scattered fixes into a single authorization-list parser.
- **[HIP-1137](https://github.com/hiero-ledger/hiero-improvement-proposals/blob/main/HIP/hip-1137.md) advanced to Last Call** - the proposal moved a status gate and implementation started in [hiero-consensus-node](https://github.com/hiero-ledger/hiero-consensus-node).
